Validate and normalise a list of imputation groups

Source: R/impute.R
dot-validate_impute_groups.Rd

Checks that groups is a non-empty list of impute_group() objects with unique names and at most one catch-all (targets = NULL) entry.

Usage

.validate_impute_groups(groups)

Arguments

groups

A list of impute_group objects.

Value

The validated groups list (invisibly the same object).
